response.overview: In a silent apartment, a young wife lives unseen beside her husband. Though he paints her portrait, he always leaves her eyes blank. Her desperate need to be acknowledged spirals into obsession, until the sound of a relentless heartbeat invades her mind - an embodiment of guilt, desire, and madness.
response.tagline: A neglected young wife descends into madness when her painter husband abuses her with a canvas with no eye
response.title: The Tell-Tale Heart

results.name: Storyboard VS Final Shot | The Tell-Tale Heart 2026 | Short Film #cinematography
The Tell-Tale Heart (2026) Short Film by Quang Hoang Dang
